description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem two-terminal dc line converters. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, rarray = a2trmdcconvreal(sid, ties, flag, entry, string)
python_syntax: ierr, rarray = a2trmdcconvreal(sid, ties, flag, entry, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem converter buses of two-terminal dc lines to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem two-terminal dc line converters to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: A flag indicating organization. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the two-terminal dc line converter quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for each end of interior subsystem two-terminal dc lines only.
for the subsystem bus end of tie two-terminal dc lines only.
for the non-subsystem bus end of tie two-terminal dc lines only.
for each end of tie two-terminal dc lines only.
for each end of interior subsystem two-terminal dc lines and the subsystem bus end of tie two-terminal dc lines.
for each end of interior subsystem two-terminal dc lines and tie two-terminal dc lines.

flag.description: for only in-service two-terminal dc lines.

string.description: ac current in amps at the from bus.
ac current in pu at the from bus.
From bus dc voltage in kV.
From bus converter angle in degrees.
From bus tap setting in pu.
Apparent active power flow into the dc line at the from bus.
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line at the from bus.
Apparent ac power flow into the dc line at the from bus.
Apparent active power flow into the dc line at the from bus (units determined by power output options).
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line at the from bus (units determined by power output options).
Apparent ac power flow into the dc line at the from bus (units determined by power output options).
Active power losses (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power losses (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
